result.reason: Implement functionality to import .moba files from MobaXTerm, providing broader compatibility for connection management.
result.approach: Create a new MobaXTermImporter class implementing IConnectionImporter<string> to parse .moba files. Integrate this new importer into App/Import.cs by updating the OpenFileDialog filter and extending BuildConnectionImporterFromFileExtension to recognize the .moba extension. Add corresponding localized strings to resource files.
